calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-01-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:00 am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk K. Liu, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants Wesley Dodds and Brian Stretch not present. Respondent, In Cheng Kam and Hui Ning Zhou present in pro per. Case #837915 and 37917 are heard together since both cases are related. Party previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles.


11:10 am
Prove-up, Judgment signed in open court.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
